마태복음 15:1.content: Then Pharisees and scribes came to Jesus from Jerusalem, saying,

마태복음 15:2.content: “Why do your disciples disobey the tradition of the elders? For they don’t wash their hands when they eat bread.”

마태복음 15:3.content: He answered them, “Why do you also disobey the commandment of God because of your tradition?

마태복음 15:4.content: For God commanded, ‘Honor your father and your mother,’ and, ‘He who speaks evil of father or mother, let him be put to death.’

마태복음 15:5.content: But you say, ‘Whoever may tell his father or his mother, “Whatever help you might otherwise have gotten from me is a gift devoted to God,”

마태복음 15:6.content: he shall not honor his father or mother.’ You have made the commandment of God void because of your tradition.

마태복음 15:7.content: You hypocrites! Well did Isaiah prophesy of you, saying,

마태복음 15:8.content: ‘These people draw near to me with their mouth, and honor me with their lips; but their heart is far from me.

마태복음 15:9.content: And in vain do they worship me, teaching as doctrine rules made by men.’ ”

마태복음 15:10.content: He summoned the multitude, and said to them, “Hear, and understand.

마태복음 15:11.content: That which enters into the mouth doesn’t defile the man; but that which proceeds out of the mouth, this defiles the man.”

마태복음 15:12.content: Then the disciples came, and said to him, “Do you know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this saying?”

마태복음 15:13.content: But he answered, “Every plant which my heavenly Father didn’t plant will be uprooted.

마태복음 15:14.content: Leave them alone. They are blind guides of the blind. If the blind guide the blind, both will fall into a pit.”

마태복음 15:15.content: Peter answered him, “Explain the parable to us.”

마태복음 15:16.content: So Jesus said, “Do you also still not understand?

마태복음 15:17.content: Don’t you understand that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the belly, and then out of the body?

마태복음 15:18.content: But the things which proceed out of the mouth come out of the heart, and they defile the man.

마태복음 15:19.content: For out of the heart come evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, sexual sins, thefts, false testimony, and blasphemies.

마태복음 15:20.content: These are the things which defile the man; but to eat with unwashed hands doesn’t defile the man.”

마태복음 15:21.content: Jesus went out from there, and withdrew into the region of Tyre and Sidon.

마태복음 15:22.content: Behold, a Canaanite woman came out from those borders, and cried, saying, “Have mercy on me, Lord, you son of David! My daughter is severely possessed by a demon!”

마태복음 15:23.content: But he answered her not a word. His disciples came and begged him, saying, “Send her away; for she cries after us.”

마태복음 15:24.content: But he answered, “I wasn’t sent to anyone but the lost sheep of the house of Israel.”

마태복음 15:25.content: But she came and worshiped him, saying, “Lord, help me.”

마태복음 15:26.content: But he answered, “It is not appropriate to take the children’s bread and throw it to the dogs.”

마태복음 15:27.content: But she said, “Yes, Lord, but even the dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters’ table.”

마태복음 15:28.content: Then Jesus answered her, “Woman, great is your faith! Be it done to you even as you desire.” And her daughter was healed from that hour.

마태복음 15:29.content: Jesus departed from there, and came near to the sea of Galilee; and he went up into the mountain, and sat there.

마태복음 15:30.content: Great multitudes came to him, having with them the lame, blind, mute, maimed, and many others, and they put them down at his feet. He healed them,

마태복음 15:31.content: so that the multitude wondered when they saw the mute speaking, the injured healed, the lame walking, and the blind seeing—and they glorified the God of Israel.

마태복음 15:32.content: Jesus summoned his disciples and said, “I have compassion on the multitude, because they continue with me now three days and have nothing to eat. I don’t want to send them away fasting, or they might faint on the way.”

마태복음 15:33.content: The disciples said to him, “Where should we get so many loaves in a deserted place as to satisfy so great a multitude?”

마태복음 15:34.content: Jesus said to them, “How many loaves do you have?” They said, “Seven, and a few small fish.”

마태복음 15:35.content: He commanded the multitude to sit down on the ground;

마태복음 15:36.content: and he took the seven loaves and the fish. He gave thanks and broke them, and gave to the disciples, and the disciples to the multitudes.

마태복음 15:37.content: They all ate, and were filled. They took up seven baskets full of the broken pieces that were left over.

마태복음 15:38.content: Those who ate were four thousand men, in addition to women and children.

마태복음 15:39.content: Then he sent away the multitudes, got into the boat, and came into the borders of Magdala.
